name: crm-happy77-monorepo
description: CRM Happy77 + lufy.cc — รันทุกอย่างด้วยคำสั่งเดียว

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n crm-api,crm-web,lufy-api,lufy-web -c green,cyan,yellow,magenta "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev" "npm --prefix modules/lufy/backend run dev" "npm --prefix modules/lufy/frontend run dev"
scripts.dev:crm: concurrently -k -n crm-api,crm-web -c green,cyan "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend run build && npm --prefix modules/lufy/backend run build && npm --prefix modules/lufy/frontend run build
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix modules/lufy/backend install && npm --prefix modules/lufy/frontend install
